subject: [CPS] Add basic_cps test into smoke usecases testcase
commit_message:
[CPS] Add basic_cps test into smoke usecases testcase

Basic CPS test checks if resources creation and deletion
on CPS works fine.

Issue-ID: INT-2194
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I8da5ee03b0312150167e521a112b6d5a72f17b0d

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/189/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/189/ )
